title: ImageSourceDetails
description: Details for importing an image from Object Storage

sourceType.description: The source type for the image

bucketName.description: The Object Storage bucket name (for objectStorageTuple)

objectName.description: The Object Storage object name (for objectStorageTuple)

sourceUri.description: The Object Storage URL for the image (for objectStorageUri source type)

sourceImageType.description: The format of the image to import

operatingSystem.description: The operating system of the image

operatingSystemVersion.description: The operating system version of the image
